title: Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-DBAC, G4 Doorbell Pro AC power adapter, 7m cable
description: The stylish power adapter for the classic EU socket is intended primarily for powering the G4 Doorbell Pro from the doorbell, it has an output voltage of 5V, a current of 2A and maximum power 10W . The adapter has a USB-C output connector on the bottom, which is ready to connect the included 7m cable with USB-C connectors on both sides
specsSearch: Power Power [W] 10 Output Voltage [V] 5 Output Current [A] 2
